looks like they're way smaller.

think we've only been around for like a year and we're scaling super fast.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between GrowthX and LiveKit to address questions about GrowthX's content creation services and explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX differentiates from competitors through cost-effectiveness, editorial focus, and scalable AI-driven workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [LiveKit is interested but timing depends on hiring a new PMM (likely December/January start)](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Key concerns: content quality assurance, technical accuracy, and integration with LiveKit's existing systems](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Next steps include addressing technical questions and potentially arranging calls with GrowthX's CEO and customer references](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Topics

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: DIY solutions (e.g., AirOps), traditional SEO agencies, and AI-forward companies like Graphite](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [GrowthX is typically 3x cheaper than Graphite](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content with programmatic capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Developing an internal platform to streamline collaboration and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### LLM Visibility and Reporting

  - [GrowthX partners with Scrunch for LLM analytics](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Can set up custom prompts and track across multiple AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [GrowthX handles setup and maintenance, delivering reports directly to clients](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Case Studies and Examples

  - [Detailed discussion of DeepGram case study (when GrowthX's CEO was CMO there)](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Key projects: AI glossary, AI apps directory, newsletter (AI Minds)](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Ramp partnership highlighted: created over 1,000 pages, including vendor database and calculators](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Involves strategy sprint to align on brand voice and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Creates artifacts like writing guidelines and proofreader checklists](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Calibration phase to ensure content quality and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Prefers direct CMS access for efficient publishing](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Questions raised about LiveKit's current setup (Vercel, Ghost CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [GrowthX to research compatibility with Vercel for content creation and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [May recommend additional tools or CMS for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

### Content Types and Capabilities

  - [Can create various content types, including directories and glossaries](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Ability to optimize existing content and create new articles](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Flexible on using bylines for articles, based on client preference](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Quality Assurance

  - [Multiple checks in place, including human review](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Technical QA for code snippets in content (to be further detailed)](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Examples of technical content: Augment Code guides and Ramp blog](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to research compatibility with Vercel and provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [GrowthX to share examples of technical content QA process](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [LiveKit to consider CMS options for scalable content management](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [Arrange call with new PMM (when hired) to ensure buy-in](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Potential call with GrowthX CEO and LiveKit CEO](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Consider customer reference call if needed](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Target kickoff in January, pending PMM hiring and onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/zCeKdyHJrPzzr5zsco3phAs3CyJLDkVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
